languages.text: {n}Себериан окидывает взглядом Патент, но из вокс-синтезатора не раздается ни гневной речи, ни проклятья, ни молитвы.{/n} "Династия спасена. Подобное непотребство — малая цена за судьбу фон Валанциус". {n}Голос его звучит блекло, почти механически.{/n}

{n}Seberian glances at the Warrant, but no angry outbursts, curses, or prayers erupt from his vox-synthesiser.{/n} "The dynasty is saved. Such an obscenity is a small price to pay for the fate of the von Valancius." {n}His voice sounds thin, almost mechanical.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан окидывает взглядом Патент, но из вокс-синтезатора не раздается ни гневной речи, ни проклятья, ни молитвы.{/n} "Династия спасена. Подобное непотребство — малая цена за судьбу фон Валанциус". {n}Голос его звучит блекло, почти механически.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian glances at the Warrant, but no angry outbursts, curses, or prayers erupt from his vox-synthesiser.{/n} "The dynasty is saved. Such an obscenity is a small price to pay for the fate of the von Valancius." {n}His voice sounds thin, almost mechanical.{/n}

{n}Seberian glances at the Warrant, but no angry outbursts, curses, or prayers erupt from his vox-synthesiser.{/n} "The dynasty is saved. Such an obscenity is a small price to pay for the fate of the von Valancius." {n}His voice sounds thin, almost mechanical. But you know that his empathic modulators are in working order. It was not the augmetics that broke, but the human being.{/n}

{n}Seberian glances at the Warrant, but no angry outbursts, curses, or prayers erupt from his vox-synthesiser.{/n} "The dynasty is saved. Such an obscenity is a small price to pay for the fate of the von Valancius." {n}His voice sounds thin, almost mechanical. But you know that his empathic modulators are in working order. It was not the augmetics that broke, but the human being.{/n}

{n}Seberian glances at the Warrant, but no angry outbursts, curses, or prayers erupt from his vox-synthesiser.{/n} "The dynasty is saved. Such an obscenity is a small price to pay for the fate of the von Valancius." {n}His voice sounds thin, almost mechanical.{/n}

languages.text: {n}シベリアンは証書をちらりと見るが、怒りの叫びや呪いの言葉、祈りの言葉は彼の音声合成器から発せられない。{/n}「王朝は救われた。このような汚い行為はフォン・ヴァランキウス家の運命のために払うべき小さな代償だ」{n}彼の声は薄く、まるで機械のように聞こえる。しかし、彼の共感モジュレーターは正常に機能していることを知っている。壊れたのは増幅器ではなく、人間そのものだった。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian glances at the Warrant, but no angry outbursts, curses, or prayers erupt from his vox-synthesiser.{/n} "The dynasty is saved. Such an obscenity is a small price to pay for the fate of the von Valancius." {n}His voice sounds thin, almost mechanical. But you know that his empathic modulators are in working order. It was not the augmetics that broke, but the human being.{/n}

traits.locale_text: シベリアは証書をちらりと見るが、怒りの叫びや呪いの言葉、祈りの言葉は彼の音声合成器から発せられない。「王朝は救われた。このような汚い行為はフォン・ヴァランキウス家の運命のために払うべき小さな代償だ」{n}彼の声は薄く、まるで機械のように聞こえる。しかし、彼の共感モジュレーターは正常に機能していることを知っている。壊れたのは増幅器ではなく、人間そのものだった。

languages.text: {n}Seberian mira la Patente sin que su voco sintetizador emita exabruptos, maldiciones ni plegarias.{/n} «La dinastía está a salvo. Esta obscenidad es un pequeño precio a pagar por el destino de los von Valancius». {n}Su voz parece débil, casi mecánica.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian glances at the Warrant, but no angry outbursts, curses, or prayers erupt from his vox-synthesiser.{/n} "The dynasty is saved. Such an obscenity is a small price to pay for the fate of the von Valancius." {n}His voice sounds thin, almost mechanical.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian mira la Patente sin que su voco sintetizador emita exabruptos, maldiciones ni plegarias.{/n} «La dinastía está a salvo. Esta obscenidad es un pequeño precio a pagar por el destino de los von Valancius». {n}Su voz parece débil, casi mecánica.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian betrachtet den Handelsbrief, aber aus seinem Vox-Synthesizer ertönen keine Wuttiraden, Flüche oder Gebete.{/n} "Die Dynastie ist gerettet. Eine derartige Obszönität ist ein geringer Preis für das Schicksal derer von Valancius." {n}Seine Stimme klingt dünn, beinahe mechanisch.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian glances at the Warrant, but no angry outbursts, curses, or prayers erupt from his vox-synthesiser.{/n} "The dynasty is saved. Such an obscenity is a small price to pay for the fate of the von Valancius." {n}His voice sounds thin, almost mechanical.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian betrachtet den Handelsbrief, aber aus seinem Vox-Synthesizer ertönen keine Wuttiraden, Flüche oder Gebete.{/n} "Die Dynastie ist gerettet. Eine derartige Obszönität ist ein geringer Preis für das Schicksal derer von Valancius." {n}Seine Stimme klingt dünn, beinahe mechanisch.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian observe la lettre, mais son synthétiseur-vox ne laisse échapper ni exclamation de colère ni même la moindre prière.{/n} « La dynastie est sauvée. Ce sacrilège n'est qu'un modeste prix à payer pour assurer l'avenir de la maison von Valancius. » {n}Il s'exprime à voix basse, d'un ton quasi mécanique.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian glances at the Warrant, but no angry outbursts, curses, or prayers erupt from his vox-synthesiser.{/n} "The dynasty is saved. Such an obscenity is a small price to pay for the fate of the von Valancius." {n}His voice sounds thin, almost mechanical.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian observe la lettre, mais son synthétiseur-vox ne laisse échapper ni exclamation de colère ni même la moindre prière.{/n} « La dynastie est sauvée. Ce sacrilège n'est qu'un modeste prix à payer pour assurer l'avenir de la maison von Valancius. » {n}Il s'exprime à voix basse, d'un ton quasi mécanique.{/n}

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安瞥了一眼贸易授状，但他的音阵合成器并未爆发出愤怒的咆哮、诅咒或祷词。{/n}“王朝得救了。相比冯·瓦兰修斯家族的命运，这种亵渎之举不过是微不足道的代价。”{n}他的声音听起来干瘪无力，几乎与机器无异。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian glances at the Warrant, but no angry outbursts, curses, or prayers erupt from his vox-synthesiser.{/n} "The dynasty is saved. Such an obscenity is a small price to pay for the fate of the von Valancius." {n}His voice sounds thin, almost mechanical.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安瞥了一眼贸易授状，但他的音阵合成器并未爆发出愤怒的咆哮、诅咒或祷词。{/n}“王朝得救了。相比冯·瓦兰修斯家族的命运，这种亵渎之举不过是微不足道的代价。”{n}他的声音听起来干瘪无力，几乎与机器无异。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ruhsatname'ye bakan Seberian'ın voks sentezleyicisinden ne öfkeli patlamalar ne küfürler ne de dualar dökülüyor.{/n} "Hanedanlık kurtuldu. Böylesine bir rezalet, von Valancius soyunun kaderi için ödenmesi gereken küçük bir bedel." {n}Sesi cılız, neredeyse mekanik geliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian glances at the Warrant, but no angry outbursts, curses, or prayers erupt from his vox-synthesiser.{/n} "The dynasty is saved. Such an obscenity is a small price to pay for the fate of the von Valancius." {n}His voice sounds thin, almost mechanical.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ruhsatname'ye bakan Seberian'ın voks sentezleyicisinden ne öfkeli patlamalar ne küfürler ne de dualar dökülüyor.{/n} "Hanedanlık kurtuldu. Böylesine bir rezalet, von Valancius soyunun kaderi için ödenmesi gereken küçük bir bedel." {n}Sesi cılız, neredeyse mekanik geliyor.{/n}
